title: marina holwayi
intro: Marina holwayi, also known as the Red Clover, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is a legume that contains isoflavones, which have been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in reducing hot flashes and night sweats in menopausal women, as well as lowering cholesterol levels and reducing the risk of osteoporosis. The health benefits of Marina holwayi include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to improve heart health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Marina holwayi can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "International journal of clinical pharmacology research", marina holwayi (ginseng extract) was found to have positive effects on health-related quality of life in menopausal women, particularly in depression, well-being, and health subscales.
